rulings.Calendar Matter: FURTHER HEARING ON ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY AN ORDER FOR SALE OF DWELLING SHOULD NOT ISSUE
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 7, 2023 line 1. FURTHER HEARING ON ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY AN ORDER FOR SALE OF DWELLING SHOULD NOT ISSUE is GRANTED. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: TROY REESE ET AL VS. MARTHA ALVAREZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And For Order For Sanctions; Notice Of Motion; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Kroner Declaration Iso; Separate Statement Iso Mtc; Proposed Order;
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 7, 2023 line 4. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER DISCOVERY is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Complete verified responses to Form Interrogatories and documents responsive to Request for Production must be hand-delivered to defendant no later than 9:00 a.m. on December 8, 2023. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,762.50. If complete verified responses and documents are not timely provided, the trial will be taken off calendar. Either side may request a new trial setting when responses are provided. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
